D2 Vision L2 Understand Atom

Chevreul's Staircase

slide the step count and watch each flat grey band look scalloped — then isolate one to prove it's uniform

Each step is painted a single flat grey, yet simultaneous contrast at the borders makes every band look like a shallow gradient — the Chevreul illusion.

Slide the number of steps and watch each band appear fluted — lighter beside its darker neighbour, darker beside its lighter one. Then toggle isolate to slip neutral gaps between bands and watch the scalloping vanish.
